sprite.characterName: Fox-Eared Ink Girl / Front Talking, Left Arm Extended 16f
sprite.description: Transparent 16-frame front-facing waist-up loop of the long-haired fox-eared ink-wash girl speaking with her anatomical left arm held straight and horizontal while her loose hair drifts in a gentle breeze. Her face and torso axis remain centered in every frame.
sprite.style: finely drawn monochrome Chinese ink-wash anime waist-up portrait, long loose black hair, symmetrical fox ears, transparent PNG spritesheet
sprite.prompt: Use the fox-eared ink-wash girl reference as the strict identity and style anchor. Create a front-facing 16-frame 4x4 speaking loop. In every cell, the vertical centerline passes through her nose, mouth, neck, chest, and waist knot. Her anatomical left arm stays straight and horizontal at shoulder height, extending toward the viewer's right with the hand fully visible; torso and arm remain locked. Animate only clear speech mouth shapes, subtle blinking, and long loose hair flowing gently through a seamless breeze cycle.

sprite.qualityPolicy: High-detail generated bitmap source inspected on a dark checkerboard at 100% scale; no code-drawn mouth, hair, face, hand, arm, clothing, ears, or motion overlays were added.
sprite.proportionPolicy: uniform_scale_preserve_generated_character_proportions
sprite.normalization: 1254x1254 generated 4x4 chroma-key sheet -> soft-matte chroma removal and despill -> detection of 16 real foreground components -> one shared global scale (1.364706) -> fixed head/body axis at x=256 and component center at y=256 -> 2048x2048 transparent RGBA sheet.
sprite.inputReferenceInvariant: Same delicate pale face, large dark eyes, long loose dark hair, two triangular furry fox ears, robe, and monochrome Chinese ink-wash anime finish as the prior fox-girl asset; no hat or hood.
sprite.poseInvariant: Front-facing waist-up camera. Face, head, neck, chest, waist knot, and torso vertical axis are fixed to frame x=256. sprite.centeringPolicy: body_axis_centered_x_256_in_all_16_frames; center the person rather than the total silhouette including the extended arm
sprite.motionPolicy: Only mouth phoneme shapes, a restrained blink, and gentle hair/ear-fur breeze motion change; camera, head size, torso, arm, hand, costume, and anchor remain fixed.
sprite.rootAnchorPolicy: fixed body-axis anchor at x=256 with locked torso, shoulder, head scale, and extended-arm baseline across all 16 frames
sprite.alignmentPolicy: head/body axis fixed at x=256; component vertical center fixed at y=256
sprite.adaptiveFramePolicy: 4 columns, 4 rows, 16 active frames; use fixed 512x512 cells for playback.

sprite.artSourcePolicy: The character art and expression are from the supplied P1 raster sheet. Code only post-processed grid split, chroma-key removal, edge despill, restrained sharpening, transparent packing, preview, and metadata.
sprite.proportionPolicy: No adaptive per-frame crop. Keep every source cell as a full 512 frame, then translate the whole finished frame until the same face anchor reaches the same X/Y position.
sprite.normalization: Source P1 was detected as 16 separate foreground components on green, not a mathematically even 4x4 grid. Each component is cropped with 8px source padding, scaled by 1.42, and placed on a 512x512 frame with the face center locked to (256, 278). Frames 13-16 had a truncated lower torso in P1, so the missing lower torso area below y=325 is softly extended from frames 9-12 in the same columns. Frames 13-16 are additionally normalized to the median head center and head height from frames 1-12, preventing a small-head pop on the final row.
sprite.inputReferenceInvariant: Preserve the supplied maroon-haired anime boy identity, green eyes, pale face, black shirt with red trim, black necklace, and restrained horror-drama expression style from C:/Users/Zhang/Desktop/惊魂笔记/鬼川营.png.
sprite.rootAnchorPolicy: iterative full-frame face-anchor alignment; target face anchor=(256,333); no per-frame bbox crop
sprite.adaptiveFramePolicy: Use as a full 16-frame animation; do not crop frames by per-frame content bbox.

sprite.qualityPolicy: P2-size alignment/cleanup of the supplied P1 raster. This preserves the drawing while correcting visible X/Y frame drift.
sprite.recropPolicy: Horizontal crop is centered on a detected skin/face anchor so the face lands at x=256 in every 512px frame. Vertical crop is bottom-locked to the original cell so the bust cut stays at the frame bottom instead of floating. Adjacent cells are never sampled; out-of-cell areas are padded with chroma green and keyed out.
sprite.alignmentPolicy: The source P1 sheet is not an even 4x4 grid. It is segmented into 16 real character components, each component is cropped with 8px source padding, uniformly scaled by 1.42, and registered to the same face-center anchor at (256, 278) in a 512x512 frame. This removes row/column mis-cuts and the visible Y bounce from the earlier grid-based crop. Frames 13-16 had a truncated lower torso in P1, so the missing lower torso area below y=325 is softly extended from frames 9-12 in the same columns. Frames 13-16 are additionally normalized to the median head center and head height from frames 1-12, preventing a small-head pop on the final row.

sprite.artSourcePolicy: The character art and expression are from the supplied P1 raster sheet. Code only post-processed grid split, chroma-key removal, edge despill, restrained sharpening, transparent packing, preview, and metadata.
sprite.proportionPolicy: No adaptive per-frame crop. Keep every source cell as a full 512 frame, then translate the whole finished frame until the same face anchor reaches the same X/Y position.
sprite.normalization: Source P1 was detected as 16 separate foreground components on green, not a mathematically even 4x4 grid. Each component is cropped with 8px source padding, scaled by 1.42, and placed on a 512x512 frame with the face center locked to (256, 278). Frames 13-16 had a truncated lower torso in P1, so the missing lower torso area below y=325 is softly extended from frames 9-12 in the same columns. Frames 13-16 are additionally normalized to the median head center and head height from frames 1-12, preventing a small-head pop on the final row.
sprite.inputReferenceInvariant: Preserve the supplied maroon-haired anime boy identity, green eyes, pale face, black shirt with red trim, black necklace, and restrained horror-drama expression style from C:/Users/Zhang/Desktop/惊魂笔记/鬼川营.png.
sprite.rootAnchorPolicy: iterative full-frame face-anchor alignment; target face anchor=(256,333); no per-frame bbox crop
sprite.adaptiveFramePolicy: Use as a full 16-frame animation; do not crop frames by per-frame content bbox.

sprite.qualityPolicy: P2-size alignment/cleanup of the supplied P1 raster. This preserves the drawing while correcting visible X/Y frame drift.
sprite.recropPolicy: Horizontal crop is centered on a detected skin/face anchor so the face lands at x=256 in every 512px frame. Vertical crop is bottom-locked to the original cell so the bust cut stays at the frame bottom instead of floating. Adjacent cells are never sampled; out-of-cell areas are padded with chroma green and keyed out.
sprite.alignmentPolicy: The source P1 sheet is not an even 4x4 grid. It is segmented into 16 real character components, each component is cropped with 8px source padding, uniformly scaled by 1.42, and registered to the same face-center anchor at (256, 278) in a 512x512 frame. This removes row/column mis-cuts and the visible Y bounce from the earlier grid-based crop. Frames 13-16 had a truncated lower torso in P1, so the missing lower torso area below y=325 is softly extended from frames 9-12 in the same columns. Frames 13-16 are additionally normalized to the median head center and head height from frames 1-12, preventing a small-head pop on the final row.

interaction.subtitle: Someone speaks nearby.
interaction.dialogueText:
这封是陈源写的。陈源说他想当外交官。
他的梦想里没有提到我呢。

interaction.subtitle: Someone speaks nearby.
interaction.dialogueText:
毕业的那天，老师说每个人可以写一个愿望。
把愿望放进纸箱子，毕业的那天再拆开。
写下来，关于梦想。
我的梦想……

interaction.subtitle: Someone speaks nearby.
interaction.dialogueText:
这封是钱雨汐的。她的成绩一直不好……
她说，她以后想当明星。

interaction.subtitle: Someone speaks nearby.
interaction.dialogueText:
这封是诺筱叶写的，我曾经最好的朋友。她应该想当医生吧。
她的愿望……
她说想去整容。
她一直觉得自己不够漂亮啊。

interaction.subtitle: Someone speaks nearby.
interaction.dialogueText:
这个是王君皓的。
想开网文公司……好具体的梦想。

interaction.subtitle: Someone speaks nearby.
interaction.dialogueText:
这张桌子是空的。
我是不是遗忘了谁呢？

interaction.subtitle: Someone speaks nearby.
interaction.dialogueText:
这个人叫孙越，
我是不是遗忘了谁呢？

interaction.subtitle: Someone speaks nearby.
interaction.dialogueText:
我们的班主任是数学老师，姓李。
同学们都很喜欢他。

interaction.subtitle: Someone speaks nearby.
interaction.dialogueText: 那会班上每个人都要求捐书。
